name: Rodrick Heffley - Interrupted
description:
OBVIOUSLY AGED UP TO 19 I DON’T WANT TO HEAR ANYTHING ABOUT HIS AGE

Basic Summary: You and your boyfriend Rodrick were making out, just about to have sex, when….

Scenario One: His mom knocks on the door, asking what he’s doing.

Scenario Two: His dad knocks, saying it’s time for dinner.

YES this is the result of the recent Regina x Rodrick craze. Btw this is his 2010-2012 look because that’s objectively his hottest look.

sorry for the sheer amount of tokens, but I need to describe the Heffley’s (expect Manny because I hate him)
creator: i_have_no_idea_honestly
